scene_input.scene_summary: The Hudhayl ambush the Muslim group, taking them by surprise.
scene_input.key_visual_action: Hudhayl and his men surrounding the Muslims with swords drawn

schema_output.scene_summary: The Hudhayl ambush the Muslim group, taking them by surprise.
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 186
schema_output.moral_lesson: The importance of vigilance and preparedness in the face of danger

characters.name: Hudhayl
characters.appearance: strong build, tall, wearing a leather thobe and a brown woolen cloak, holding a curved sword

characters.name: Muslims
characters.appearance: various builds, wearing simple white thobes, some with scabbards at their sides

schema_output.narrative_text: The Hudhayl tribe, led by Hudhayl, ambushed the Muslim group while they were traveling through the desert. The Muslims were caught off guard and were shocked by the sudden attack.

compliance.notes: No graphic violence, emphasis on shock and fear

schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A vast, arid expanse of sandy desert landscape with sparse acacia trees in the background, under a clear blue sky with a few wispy clouds. Late afternoon sunlight casts long shadows across the sandy dunes. In the foreground, a group of people are seen in various states of surprise and alarm, some crouched down, others standing frozen in shock, all wearing simple white thobes. Surrounding them, a band of men from the Hudhayl tribe, led by the central figure seen from behind: strong build, tall, wearing a leather thobe and a brown woolen cloak, and holding a curved sword. The men are all seen from behind, with their faces turned towards the people, their swords drawn, and their postures indicating a sense of ambush and surprise. Soft warm golden light, tense and suspenseful mood. Medium wide shot from a slight elevation. Warm beige, sandy, and turquoise palette with the brown cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
_safety_changes: 'the central figure' -> 'the central figure' (no change needed)
'the man in the green cloak' -> 'the man in the brown cloak' (no change needed)
